issue_title: Titlebar only updates when you switch tabs (not when terminal changes it)
issue_body:
It looks like the event that updates the _titlebar_ (TerminalPage calling TitleChangeHandlers) got disconnected. The tab works fine.

https://github.com/microsoft/terminal/commit/9ed3da8b3b3b91f17731fcb33343de3485aa473f#diff-ded63038d58dbb9f43cb344d7cc06c76L727-L737 removed the roundabout "page listens to control to make tab update itself" event handler, but in doing so broke this.
pr_title: Restore ability to set window title from commandline
pr_body:
## Summary of the Pull Request

I regressed being able to set the window title with `title foo` in #3540. This restores that bit.
